title: German Fish Bowl
description: A hearty and flavorful German-inspired fish dish, served in a bowl with a side of garlicky roasted vegetables.
instructions: Season the fish with salt and pepper, and place it on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the fish with olive oil and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, heat the Thai red curry paste in a pan over medium heat.
Add the roasted vegetables to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until heated through.
Serve the fish in a bowl, topped with the garlicky roasted vegetables.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
